title: Old-ish Ender
description: This pack reverts the enderman's eyes to the older, more pale color before Mojang added emissive eyes to mobs in snapshot 24w39a.
body:
This pack reverts the enderman's eyes to the older, more pale color before Mojang added emissive eyes to mobs in snapshot 24w39a.

I've also redone the enderman spawn egg texture!

[Left image is Mojang's, right image is mine.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d31936de31ad8f7e6bb95a13a3893ff0ae51df9.png)
